name: West Haven Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped dates, baking soda, and boiling water in a small bowl.
2. Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
3. Sift together the flour, cocoa, and salt; set aside.
4. In a mixing bowl, cream the vegetable shortening and sugar using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Blend in the date mixture.
7. Stir in the dry ingredients.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
9. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a rack.
11. Cut into squares and serve with a scoop of vanilla ice cream on top.
